job_title: Software Engineer - Simulation Scenario Full Stack
job_nlp_title: Software Engineer - Simulation Scenario Full Stack
taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Software Engineering, Full Stack Engineer
core_skills: C++, Python, Web APIs, TypeScript, Single-page web applications
skill_match_scores: C++:0.0, Python:1.0, Web APIs:1.0, TypeScript:1.0, Single-page web applications:1.0
must_have_quals: 3+ years of industry experience in C++ and Python development, 2+ years of industry experience, with proficiency in Web APIs and TypeScript, Experience building sophisticated single-page web applications with modern web development frameworks, such as React, Angular, or Vue, Experience developing scalable web back-end services, A BS in Computer Science or related field
preferred_quals: Experience with 3D libraries/engines (e.g., Three.js, OpenGL, Unity, etc.), Experience with simulation, robotics, or autonomous vehicles
core_responsibilities: Develop autonomous driving simulation scenario tools to author, inspect, and evaluate the performance of autonomous driving software, Extend a web-based front-end for 3D graphical definition of detailed autonomous driving simulation scenarios, Extend a web back-end to interact with simulation, autonomous driving, and agentic AI software, Work closely with internal customers and other stakeholders to gather requirements and design solutions
job_summary: Zoox is developing the first ground-up, fully autonomous vehicle fleet and the supporting ecosystem required to bring this technology to market. They are seeking a full-stack engineer to develop tools for testing and ensuring the safety of autonomous vehicles, focusing on simulation scenario tools for authoring, inspecting, and evaluating performance.
